variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 10774 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 10774 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
